name: Aldric the Jeweler
description: A thin, precise man with a jeweler's loupe perpetually perched on his forehead. His fingers are stained with polishing compound.

start.text: Ah, a customer! Or... merely curious? Either way, do be careful around the display cases.
start.narrative: Aldric looks up from a gemstone he's been examining under a magnifying glass.

responses.text: I heard you've been buying strange gems.

wares.text: Rings, amulets, circlets — all crafted with the finest stones. I also appraise magical items, if you've found anything unusual in your travels.
wares.narrative: He gestures to the gleaming display cases.

gems.text: Who told you— Never mind. Yes, I've acquired some... unusual specimens. They pulse with inner light. Definitely Eltharan in origin. I'm studying their properties.
gems.narrative: He glances around quickly and lowers his voice.

source.text: The peddler at the crossroads brought them. Says he found them at the forest edge. But I know Eltharan work when I see it — these came from the ruins, mark my words.
source.narrative: He holds up a faintly glowing stone between thumb and forefinger.

magical.text: They resonate with something. When I bring two close together, they hum. I believe they're fragments of an Eltharan seal — the same kind that's said to be weakening beneath the ruins.
magical.narrative: His scholarly curiosity overcomes his caution.
